diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, quick question about the pity system. I'm at 80 pulls without a 5-star and I just want to understand where I am.
[Agent] Happy to help. I'll need to verify your account first. Could you provide your UID and the email on file?
[Caller] UID is 803990456. Email is apatel at email dot com.
[Agent] Verified. Per our Pity System Policy, the hard pity on the character event banner is at pull 90, which guarantees a 5-star. Soft pity begins at pull 75, at which point the 5-star drop rate increases substantially. Your current pull count since last 5-star is 62 — I'm looking now, let me double-check — actually, my apology, you said 80. Let me re-pull. Yes, your current count is 80 pulls. You are within the soft pity range, which means the next 10 pulls have a dramatically elevated chance of producing a 5-star. The hard guarantee triggers at pull 90.
[Caller] OK so I'm in the danger zone.
[Agent] Per policy, your situation is within expected parameters. The system is working as designed.
[Caller] Alright. Thanks for confirming.
[Agent] Is there anything else?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support.
